svg.title: Field pod detail — µReticulum packet path from sensor to hub
svg.desc: One field pod: two sensor nodes connect via RNode BLE to the field RNode, which forwards over LoRa to the hub RNode. WiFi UDP is a fallback path when available. LXMF messages flow upward; commands flow back down.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through the sn_soil boot and send sequence')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the sn_air boot and send sequence')
sendPrompt('What role does the field RNode play in the mesh?')
sendPrompt('How does the hub RNode connect to rnsd?')
sendPrompt('How does rnsd route packets to FarmLXMFHub?')
sendPrompt('What does FarmLXMFHub do when it receives a message?')
sendPrompt('When would a sensor use WiFi instead of RNode BLE?')
sendPrompt('How do downlink commands reach sensor nodes?')

svg.text: Sensor sends on ALL online interfaces simultaneously — RNode BLE + WiFi UDP if both up.
Hub identity discovered via announce; LXMF wraps telemetry payload.
enable_transport: False on sensor nodes · True on sn_support relay only.
